blocked_route: Uniform external-field local SDPI/spectral-independence with coefficient 2/w.
breakthrough_reduction: The final proof must be a maximum principle or KKT barrier, not a black-box all-external-field SDPI theorem.
not_blocked: The original shell-domination inequality remains viable because those high-eta points have ratios far below 1.
why_blocked: There exist sampled external fields whose local chi-square contraction coefficient exceeds 2/w.
